title: ✰PREMIUM Eagle exclusive: Former Billy Joel drummer Liberty DeVitto on his decades-long tenure with iconic songwriter, his affinity for Brooklyn
summary:
One would never guess that the unassuming, down-to-earth Liberty DeVitto once sat in the drum throne for one of the most successful artists.

author: Wayne Daren Schneiderman

title: March 29: ON THIS DAY IN HISTORY
summary:
